title: Steve Montovano
compiled_truth: Steve Montovano is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-10-28 to 2002-02-06), Steve Montovano sent 37 and received 683 emails, totalling 720 interactions. Top correspondents: [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (29), [D  Steffes](people/d-steffes) (10), [Harry Kingerski](people/harry-kingerski) (4), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (3), [Janine Migden](people/janine-migden) (3). Mailbox folders observed: 2001_budget__cost_cutting, 2001_objectives, 2001_prc__midyear, 2002_budget, compliments, deleted_items.
